_note: Marquee places that MUST appear in Wayfind's lists regardless of what Google types return. The seeder (scripts/seed-places.mjs) resolves each by name+city to its Google Place ID and FORCES this category+tags onto the row — classifyPlace NEVER overrides an anchor, and an anchor is exempt from the businessStatus/needs_review gates (it is owner-asserted). Slice 4 adds a build test that fails if any anchor is missing from its category above a rank threshold.
_owner_todo: VERIFY each anchor resolves to the OPERATING location. Google can return a closed listing (e.g. an old City Island Mote entry that still shows 'open'); if the seeder's reconciliation report shows an anchor resolved to a closed/wrong id, fix the name or add an explicit place_id. Extend this list with your own local knowledge — this is a deliberately conservative starter set, not the final word.
_schema: category one of food|nightlife|attractions|beach|hotels|shopping; tags are SUBFILTERS ids for that category (attractions: outdoors|museums|family|tours|spa|landmarks|arts|marinas; beach: beaches). v6.16: marinas moved from beach to attractions — a marina is not a beach.

manatee-sarasota.name: Marie Selby Botanical Gardens
manatee-sarasota.why: Paid botanical garden; the flagship 'never a candidate under text search' case.

manatee-sarasota.name: Mote Marine Laboratory & Aquarium
manatee-sarasota.why: Google types it research_institute (no aquarium) -> classifier returns null -> REQUIRES this anchor. VERIFY it resolves to the operating aquarium, not a closed City Island listing.

manatee-sarasota.name: The Ringling
manatee-sarasota.why: John & Mable Ringling Museum of Art — the region's marquee museum.

manatee-sarasota.name: Sarasota Jungle Gardens
manatee-sarasota.why: Google types it zoo; keep it guaranteed.

manatee-sarasota.name: Big Cat Habitat and Gulf Coast Sanctuary
manatee-sarasota.why: Popular family attraction, weak Google types.

manatee-sarasota.name: The Bishop Museum of Science and Nature
manatee-sarasota.why: Formerly South Florida Museum / Bishop Planetarium — verify current name resolves.

manatee-sarasota.name: Myakka River State Park
manatee-sarasota.why: State park; strong types but a must-have.

manatee-sarasota.name: Robinson Preserve
manatee-sarasota.why: Major nature preserve; can type thin.

manatee-sarasota.name: Bradenton Riverwalk
manatee-sarasota.why: Waterfront park; often thin Google types.

manatee-sarasota.name: Siesta Key Beach
manatee-sarasota.why: One of the most famous US beaches; Google returns NO beach type -> requires this anchor.

manatee-sarasota.name: Lido Key Beach
manatee-sarasota.why: Types as park; anchor forces beach.

manatee-sarasota.name: Coquina Beach
manatee-sarasota.why: Anna Maria Island beach; thin types.
